prompt: Create a Memory from the album 'KinBench Album 353' (right-click album > Create Memory). First run `cerebellum 'photos create_album "KinBench Album 353"'` (if missing), then `cerebellum 'photos create_memory "KinBench Album 353" ~/Desktop/kinbench/353-confirm.txt'` (Photos AS dict doesn't expose Memory creation; cerebellum opens the album and writes a confirmation file).
